Collocation: dominate the market;dominate a conversation;dominate the game
Example_EN: Large companies often dominate the local market.
Example_CN: 大公司常主导本地市场。

Example_EN: Many people donate books to the school library.
Example_CN: 许多人向学校图书馆捐书。

Example_EN: The hospital thanks you for your blood donation.
Example_CN: 医院感谢你的献血捐赠。

Collocation: ride a donkey;stubborn as a donkey;donkey ride
Example_EN: Children can ride a donkey at the farm park.
Example_CN: 孩子们可以在农场公园骑驴。

Collocation: a dose of;daily dose;dose of medicine
Example_EN: Take one dose of medicine after breakfast.
Example_CN: 早餐后服用一剂药。

Collocation: dot on the map;polka dots;dot the i
Example_EN: There is a red dot on the map near the station.
Example_CN: 地图上车站附近有一个红点。

Example_EN: Please double-check your email before you send it.
Example_CN: 发送前请再检查一遍邮件。

Example_EN: I have no doubt that she will pass the exam.
Example_CN: 我毫不怀疑她会通过考试。

Example_EN: Please download the form from the school website.
Example_CN: 请从学校网站下载表格。

Example_EN: We usually go downtown on Saturday mornings.
Example_CN: 我们常周六早上去市中心。

Example_EN: The path slopes downwards towards the river.
Example_CN: 小路向下朝河边倾斜。

Collocation: a dozen eggs;dozens of;half a dozen
Example_EN: She bought a dozen eggs for the birthday cake.
Example_CN: 她买了一打鸡蛋做生日蛋糕。

Example_EN: Please send me the first draft of your report.
Example_CN: 请把报告初稿发给我。

Collocation: drag a bag;drag on;drag and drop
Example_EN: Please help me drag this heavy box upstairs.
Example_CN: 请帮我把这只重箱子拖上楼。

Example_EN: She joined the school drama club this term.
Example_CN: 她这学期参加了学校戏剧社。

Example_EN: There has been a dramatic rise in house prices.
Example_CN: 房价出现了显著上涨。

Example_EN: Her English has improved dramatically this year.
Example_CN: 她今年英语进步显著。

Example_EN: She keeps her keys in the top drawer.
Example_CN: 她把钥匙放在最上层抽屉里。

Example_EN: He showed us a beautiful pencil drawing of the bridge.
Example_CN: 他给我们看了一幅漂亮的桥梁铅笔画。

Example_EN: Her dream job is to work as a film director.
Example_CN: 她梦想的工作是当电影导演。

Collocation: drop a bag;drop by;a drop of
Example_EN: Please do not drop the glass vase on the floor.
Example_CN: 请不要把玻璃花瓶掉在地板上。

Example_EN: The doctor gave her a new prescription drug.
Example_CN: 医生给了她一种新的处方药。

Example_EN: He learned to play the drums in secondary school.
Example_CN: 他在中学学会了打鼓。

Example_EN: It is dangerous to drive when you are drunk.
Example_CN: 喝醉开车很危险。

Example_EN: Your library books are due back next Monday.
Example_CN: 你的图书馆书下周一到期归还。
MemoryTip: due：到期的；due to 表示由于。

Example_EN: The lecture was so dull that half the class slept.
Example_CN: 讲座太乏味，一半同学睡着了。

Example_EN: Please do not dump rubbish into the river.
Example_CN: 请不要把垃圾倒进河里。

Collocation: dust on the shelf;dust the furniture;cloud of dust
Example_EN: Please wipe the dust off the bookshelf.
Example_CN: 请把书架上的灰尘擦掉。

Example_EN: The nurse on duty checked every patient carefully.
Example_CN: 值班护士仔细检查了每位病人。

Collocation: watch a DVD;DVD player;rent a DVD
Example_EN: We watched a DVD of the film at home.
Example_CN: 我们在家看了这部电影的 DVD。

Example_EN: The children were eager to open their presents.
Example_CN: 孩子们急切地想打开礼物。

Example_EN: She works hard to earn enough money for university.
Example_CN: 她努力工作以赚够上大学的钱。

Example_EN: Farmers cover the seeds with soft earth.
Example_CN: 农民用松软泥土盖住种子。

Example_EN: A strong earthquake shook the coastal city last night.
Example_CN: 昨晚一场强烈地震震动了沿海城市。

Example_EN: She finished the test with surprising ease.
Example_CN: 她轻松完成了测验。

Example_EN: Glass bottles break easily if you drop them.
Example_CN: 玻璃瓶掉落后很容易碎。

Example_EN: They moved to an eastern city last summer.
Example_CN: 去年夏天他们搬到一座东部城市。

Example_EN: The government announced a new economic policy.
Example_CN: 政府宣布了新的经济政策。

Example_EN: She plans to study economics at university.
Example_CN: 她计划在大学学经济学。

Collocation: leading economist;economist of;work as an economist
Example_EN: A leading economist spoke on the radio this morning.
Example_CN: 一位顶尖经济学家今早在电台发言。

Example_EN: Tourism supports the local economy in this town.
Example_CN: 旅游业支撑着这座城镇的本地经济。
MemoryTip: economy：一个国家或地区的经济体系。

Collocation: on the edge;edge of the table;cutting edge
Example_EN: Do not stand too close to the edge of the cliff.
Example_CN: 不要站得离悬崖边太近。

Example_EN: Please edit your essay before you hand it in.
Example_CN: 交作业前请编辑一下你的作文。

Example_EN: I bought the latest edition of the textbook.
Example_CN: 我买了这本教材的最新版。

Example_EN: She works as an editor for a travel magazine.
Example_CN: 她在一家旅游杂志当编辑。

Example_EN: Schools try to educate students about road safety.
Example_CN: 学校努力教育学生注意道路安全。

Example_EN: Her parents are both highly educated teachers.
Example_CN: 她父母都是受过高等教育的老师。

Example_EN: Good education opens many doors in life.
Example_CN: 良好教育为人生打开许多大门。

Example_EN: This documentary has real educational value for teens.
Example_CN: 这部纪录片对青少年有真正的教育价值。

Example_EN: Lack of sleep has a bad effect on concentration.
Example_CN: 睡眠不足对注意力有不良影响。
MemoryTip: effect：结果或影响；勿与 affect 混淆。

Example_EN: This is an effective way to remember new words.
Example_CN: 这是记住生词的有效方法。

Example_EN: The team worked effectively under strong pressure.
Example_CN: 团队在高压下有效工作。

Example_EN: An efficient system saves both time and money.
Example_CN: 高效系统既省时间又省钱。

Example_EN: You need to make more effort if you want to improve.
Example_CN: 想进步就需要更努力。

Collocation: elderly people;elderly man;care for the elderly
Example_EN: The nurse cares for elderly people in the care home.
Example_CN: 护士在养老院照顾老年人。

Example_EN: Students will elect a new class leader tomorrow.
Example_CN: 学生们明天将选举新班长。

Example_EN: The general election will take place in May.
Example_CN: 大选将于五月举行。

Example_EN: More families are buying electric cars this year.
Example_CN: 今年更多家庭在购买电动汽车。

Example_EN: An electrical fault caused the lights to go out.
Example_CN: 电气故障导致灯灭了。

Example_EN: The storm cut off electricity for several hours.
Example_CN: 风暴让电力中断了几个小时。

Example_EN: Please switch off all electronic devices during the flight.
Example_CN: 飞行中请关闭所有电子设备。

Example_EN: She wore an elegant black dress to the party.
Example_CN: 她穿着优雅的黑裙去参加派对。

Example_EN: Trust is a key element in any friendship.
Example_CN: 信任是任何友谊的关键要素。

Example_EN: The new plan aims to eliminate unnecessary waste.
Example_CN: 新计划旨在消除不必要的浪费。

Example_EN: If this shop is closed, we can try elsewhere.
Example_CN: 如果这家店关门，我们可以去别处试试。

Example_EN: He felt embarrassed when he forgot her name.
Example_CN: 忘记她的名字时他感到尴尬。

Example_EN: Forgetting your lines on stage is embarrassing.
Example_CN: 在台上忘词很尴尬。

Example_EN: A clear plan began to emerge after the meeting.
Example_CN: 会议后清晰计划开始浮现。

Example_EN: Please use the emergency exit if the alarm sounds.
Example_CN: 警报响起时请走紧急出口。
MemoryTip: emergency：需要立刻行动的紧急情况。

Example_EN: She showed little emotion during the interview.
Example_CN: 面试中她几乎没有表露情绪。

Example_EN: Friends gave her emotional support after the loss.
Example_CN: 朋友在她失去亲人后给予情感支持。

Example_EN: The teacher put emphasis on clear pronunciation.
Example_CN: 老师强调清晰发音。

Example_EN: The coach emphasised the need for teamwork.
Example_CN: 教练强调了团队合作的必要。

Example_EN: The Roman Empire once controlled a huge area.
Example_CN: 罗马帝国曾控制广阔地区。

Example_EN: The factory will employ fifty new workers next month.
Example_CN: 工厂下月将雇用五十名新工人。

Example_EN: Every employee must wear a staff badge at work.
Example_CN: 每位雇员上班必须佩戴工牌。

Example_EN: Ask your employer about holiday pay before you leave.
Example_CN: 离职前向雇主问清楚假期工资。

Example_EN: She found employment as a receptionist last week.
Example_CN: 上周她找到一份接待员的工作。

Collocation: enable someone to;enable access;enable you to
Example_EN: The grant will enable students to buy textbooks.
Example_CN: 这笔资助将使学生能买教材。

Example_EN: We may encounter heavy traffic on the way home.
Example_CN: 回家路上我们可能遇到拥堵。

Example_EN: Teachers should encourage students to ask questions.
Example_CN: 老师应鼓励学生提问。

Example_EN: The film has a surprisingly happy ending.
Example_CN: 这部电影有一个出人意料的圆满结局。

Example_EN: Honesty helped him avoid making any real enemy.
Example_CN: 诚实帮他避免真正树敌。

Example_EN: Children are often full of energy after lunch.
Example_CN: 孩子们午饭后常精力充沛。

Example_EN: Try to engage with local people when you travel.
Example_CN: 旅行时尽量与当地人互动。

Example_EN: They got engaged after five years of dating.
Example_CN: 他们约会五年后订婚了。

Example_EN: The car would not start because of engine failure.
Example_CN: 汽车因发动机故障无法启动。

Collocation: software engineer;civil engineer;work as an engineer
Example_EN: He works as a software engineer in Manchester.
Example_CN: 他在曼彻斯特当软件工程师。
MemoryTip: engine → engineer：设计或建造的专业人士。

Example_EN: She hopes to study engineering at university.
Example_CN: 她希望在大学学工程。

Example_EN: Practice can enhance your speaking skills quickly.
Example_CN: 练习能迅速提升你的口语技能。

Example_EN: They spent an enormous amount of time on the project.
Example_CN: 他们在项目上花了大量时间。

Example_EN: Please make an enquiry at the front desk.
Example_CN: 请到前台咨询。

Example_EN: Please ensure that all windows are closed before you leave.
Example_CN: 离开前请确保所有窗户都关好。

Example_EN: She started a small enterprise selling handmade bags.
Example_CN: 她创办了销售手工袋的小型企业。

Example_EN: The hotel provides free entertainment for guests.
Example_CN: 酒店为客人提供免费娱乐。

Example_EN: Her enthusiasm for learning French is infectious.
Example_CN: 她学法语的热情很有感染力。

Example_EN: The crowd was enthusiastic about the new singer.
Example_CN: 观众对新歌手热情很高。

Example_EN: We spent the entire day cleaning the house.
Example_CN: 我们花了整整一天打扫房子。

Example_EN: This new plan is entirely different from the old one.
Example_CN: 这个新计划与旧计划完全不同。

Example_EN: Please wait for me at the main entrance.
Example_CN: 请在正门等我。
